message.content:
[cron:3c279099-bddb-4ef3-bfea-fc22f342abd8 AInchors Morning Stand-Up] Use the exec tool to run this shell command: bash /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/generate-standup.sh

The script reads state files and builds the 8-section stand-up HTML, piping it to the Canvas document at ~/.openclaw/canvas/documents/standup-daily/index.html. Do NOT use the write tool — the script handles file output via its own pipe. No reply needed unless the script exits non-zero. If idempotency blocks a re-run (date already generated), set STANDUP_FORCE=1 in the environment before invoking.
Current time: Sunday, July 19th, 2026 - 8:00 AM (Asia/Kuala_Lumpur)
Reference UTC: 2026-07-19 00:00 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly with an explicit target. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.
